title: Trace an AWS cost anomaly to a usage type
description: Drive from the bill down to a specific usage type and resource using Cost Explorer grouping and CUR before changing architecture.
body: Use when the AWS bill jumps unexpectedly. Do not start deleting resources blindly. Actions: open Cost Explorer, group by Service then by Usage Type to find the line item (e.g. NatGateway-Bytes, DataTransfer-Regional-Bytes, Lambda-GB-Second), pivot by linked account and tag, and confirm the offending resource in CUR. Validation signals include the anomaly isolated to one usage type, a hypothesis confirmed by the resource's own metrics, and the projected saving quantified before any change. Risk boundary: deleting or downsizing a production resource to cut cost is human-gated.
